pi_items.source: setup_magento.sh line 290: Creates product with SKU 'BOTTLE-001' named 'Insulated Water Bottle'
Adobe Commerce and Magento documentation confirm 'field' is the database value for Text Field custom option type
Magento custom options support price_type values of 'fixed' (absolute price) or 'percent' (percentage-based). 'fixed' is standard and verified in catalog_product_option_price table documentation
Cannot independently verify without executing the task or accessing actual database. Title is plausible for a text engraving custom option.
Cannot independently verify without executing the task or accessing actual database. Price is reasonable for a custom engraving service add-on.
Cannot independently verify without executing the task or accessing actual database. SKU is reasonable for an engraving option.
Cannot independently verify without executing the task or accessing actual database. Character limit of 15 is reasonable for laser engraving text field.
Cannot independently verify without executing the task or accessing actual database. Making engraving optional (not required) is reasonable.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic Magento 2 environment. The product BOTTLE-001 ('Insulated Water Bottle') is created programmatically by the setup script (setup_magento.sh) via REST API with base price 19.99 and stock quantity 600 in the Sports category. The custom option metadata specifies a Text Field type (database value 'field'), which is the correct Magento type code. The price_type 'fixed' is the standard non-percentage pricing type in Magento's catalog_product_option_price table. All other metadata values (option title 'Laser Engraving', price 4.99, SKU 'engrave', max characters 15, not required) are reasonable for a text engraving custom option but cannot be independently verified without task execution.
